stories.title: Short label for quick scanning
stories.story: The full story text — first person. This is what the AI reads to understand you.

star_stories.title: Solved production outage in 30 minutes
star_stories.situation: Production database hit 100% CPU during peak traffic.
star_stories.task: Identify root cause and restore service before the SLA window expired.
star_stories.action: Isolated the runaway query, killed the session, deployed an index hotfix.
star_stories.result: Service restored within 30 minutes, well inside SLA. Root cause documented for the team.
star_stories.framing_hints: Great answer for 'tell me about a time you handled a crisis' or 'describe your debugging process'.
star_stories.source: Real incident at Example Corp, January 2026
star_stories.notes: Pair with the postmortem doc when going deeper.

responses.q1_no_spec_project: Sketched a system diagram first, then prototyped.
responses.q2_critical_feedback: Thanked the reviewer and revised within 24h.
responses.q3_tedious_finish: Broke into checklists; finished but felt drained.
responses.q4_senior_disagreement: Asked clarifying questions, presented data, accepted final call.

hbdi_profile.notes: Primary D (experimental/visionary) with strong A (analytical) backup.
